BEYOND THE STONE · COMPLETE DESIGN SERVICES

Beyond the Stone.
Complete Design Services.

Landscaping, fireplace design, 3D wall art, custom sculpturing, and full design services — every element of your outdoor environment, considered.

REQUEST A CONSULTATION VIEW PORTFOLIO

Our Services

Every Element. Considered.

Six services that extend beyond stone fabrication — from initial design to the finished outdoor environment.

Landscaping

Landscaping

Front porches, patios, and backyards transformed. We design and build welcoming entrances and beautiful outdoor spaces suited to summer entertaining. Natural stone and precast elements coordinated into a cohesive landscape that ages well.

Request Landscaping

3D Wall Art

3D Wall Art

Handmade concrete 3D wall panels for modern and distinctive interior and exterior feature walls. Each panel is entirely handmade — no moulds repeated, no patterns duplicated. Authentic and memorable architectural art.

Request 3D Wall Art

Design Services

Design Services

Full design from first sketch to final finish. Our experienced designers guide material selection, proportion, and detail to bring your vision to life. Coordination with your architect or contractor throughout the process.

Request Design Services

Fireplace

Fireplace Design

Outdoor traditional fireplaces and modern firepits — designed for year-round outdoor living. Indoor: classical carved limestone surrounds and contemporary profiles. Both bring warmth, permanence, and considered design to any setting.

Request Fireplace Design

Sculpturing

Sculpturing

Personalized custom statues for front yards, garden features, and architectural installations. Any shape, available in 3 materials and a range of colours. From classical figurative work to contemporary abstract forms.

Request Sculpturing
Architectural Material

GFRC · Advanced Concrete

GFRC

Glass Fiber Reinforced Concrete

An advanced composite of glass fibers and cementitious matrix — dramatically lighter than standard concrete, capable of achieving forms and surface detail that traditional precast cannot.

  • Up to 75% lighter than precast
  • Complex forms and deep relief
  • Facades, walls, fireplaces & more
  • Ontario Made fabrication
Learn About GFRC Request a Quote
[ Photography ]
Coming Soon

AI Rendering

AI Rendering Tool

Upload a photo of your home and see how our stone products look on your property before you order. Visualize different limestone colours, veneer patterns, and architectural elements on your actual facade.

A project beyond stone?

Our team handles the full scope — from design through delivery. Let's talk about your vision.
